g.text: Self-Service Rule Capture (DQ Chatbot App + DQ Backend App)
Rule & Metric Store (Unity Catalog -- Delta Tables)
Data Engineers | Business Analysts | Product Owners | Tech Leads | DataOps | Data Governance
RAG Retriever > SQL Generator > Security Guard
SQL Validator > Duplicate Detector > Trend Scorer
Data Engineers and BAs author rules via the DQ Chatbot App (Databricks Apps + LangGraph).
Product Owners and Tech Leads approve. DataOps monitors.
NL request -> LLM intent parse -> CRAG-gated RAG retrieval
-> Duplicate Detector -> Trend Score -> Approval Gateway.
Result: a governed, versioned rule in anomaly_check_config.
ANOMALY_DETECTION_JOB reads only rules linked to this job.
Executes SELECT checks on UC Delta tables.
Z-score, volume, freshness, null-rate, behavioral patterns.
Drift Classifier maps to failure taxonomy.
Lineage Tracer finds Patient Zero upstream.
Playbook Compiler outputs JSON remediation recipe.
Circuit Breaker pauses risky downstream jobs.
Notifications sent (P1 Jira + email for CRITICAL).
